title: Zombie Chickens
description: he adds zombie chickens and various other mobs and items
body:
# Zombie Chickens Mod
**The mod was originally created by another creator on PlanetMinecraft. This is a remastered of the Zombie chickens** 

# Zombie Chickens
![zombie chickens attack and infect other chickens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f06c17a0201c590f7bc02e6392271c7ade0fd469.png)
**Zombie chickens are undead chickens that attack and infect other chickens**

# other mobs and items
**Unfortunately I don't have any pictures for the last mobs and items, but I'll explain it like this. The mod adds 2 more mobs and a throwable item in addition to the zombie chicken**

Zombie Steve: This undead mob also attacks and infects chickens

Zombie Hunter: This is not a zombie but a hunter that only hunts zombie types
Zombie Chicken Egg: This throwable item creates zombie chickens if it hits the block when thrown. It can be made with a normal egg, two rotten meat and two chicken foods

# Chickens
**The chicken drop has been changed slightly. Chickens now have a chance to drop eggs when they die**
